title: MoClo Reaction Protocol
author: Laura Sánchez
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8j8hurw

steps.title: Dilutions for Parts and Destination Vectors...
steps.instruction: Dilutions for Parts and Destination Vectors Follow instructions on "Dilutions_PRINT" sheet If dilutions are already done, skip to "Reaction Set-up" below.

steps.title: Turn on PCR machine Thaw DNA...
steps.instruction: Turn on PCR machine Thaw DNA samples Thaw 10x NEB ligase buffer on ice

steps.title: ___ uL of each part ___...
steps.instruction: ___ uL of each part ___ uL destination vector ___ μL sterile H2O 0.5 μL of Promega T4 ligase enzyme

steps.title: Obtain 1 PCR tube per reaction...
steps.instruction: Obtain 1 PCR tube per reaction and label Add the following to each tube in order: 2μL of NEB ligation buffer (10x)

steps.title: Close PCR tubes and spin them...
steps.instruction: Close PCR tubes and spin them to collect liquid at the bottom of tube

steps.title: Incubate as follows in PCR machine
steps.instruction: Incubate as follows in PCR machine: Level 1 or 2: 25 cycles of [37°C 1.5min, 16°C 3min], 50°C 5min, 80°C 10min, hold at 4°C Use in transformation or store at -20°C until use
